title: Agentic Workspace final response admission result
description: Host admission boundary result for a model-authored final response attempt.

kind.description: Stable discriminator for final-response admission command output.

status.description: Whether the host accepted final custody transfer or rejected the attempt and resumed work.

terminal_outcome_contract.description: Terminal outcome contract used to decide whether a final response is authorized.

admission.description: Detailed admission decision, including rejection and resume transition facts.

continuation_operation.description: Ordinary AW continuation operation executed after an unauthorized final response.

checkpoint_write.description: Local checkpoint write result for the persisted admission slice.

checkpoint_before.description: Local admission checkpoint state observed before this command.

checkpoint_after.description: Local admission checkpoint state observed after this command.

rule.description: Boundary rule for interpreting this command output.
